allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== choco ==="; \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== ChocolateyInstall ==="; $env:ChocolateyInstall)
